About

I'm a software engineer at Mews building production systems that actually hold up.

Background

Started in software development, moved into building production systems when I saw how much potential there was to automate and improve workflows. Now my main focus is the gap between "it works locally" and "it runs reliably in production."

What I Do

Building, deploying, and maintaining production systems. Writing code that doesn't make the next person curse my name.
